Web_System_Hero.web_hero_desc: CMS powered foundation, - fast, scalable and ready to customize as your business grows.

Web_System_Page.web_header2: A solid foundation delivered and handed over to you
Web_System_Page.web_desc: We design and built a flexible website system that gives you full control from day one.From structure and CMS setup to performance and scalability, everything is delivered as a complete hand-off - so your team can manage content, evolve features and scale confidently over time.
Web_System_Page.web_desc1: After purchasing the system we walk through a consultation to define:
Web_System_Page.list_item1: What are you trying to achieve with your website setup
Web_System_Page.list_item2: How it should look feel and function
Web_System_Page.web_desc3: Each website system is adopted per project, Structure design and features are tailored to your content goals, and workflow. The system provides the foundation not a fixed template.
Web_System_Page.web_desc4: Once aligned we design and built the system, - then hand it over, ready to use and extend

Web_System_FAQ.web_system_question1: What happens when i purchase the website system setup?
Web_System_FAQ.web_system_answer_1: After purchasing we schedule a consultation to define your goals, structure and best long-term approach.Once aligned, we design and built the full website system and prepare it for hand-off
Web_System_FAQ.web_system_question2: Is this a one time built or a subscription?
Web_System_FAQ.web_system_answer_2: This is a one-time build with a full hand-off.There is no ongoing subscription required, unless you choose optional maintenance later
Web_System_FAQ.web_system_question3: Can i manage and update the website myself?
Web_System_FAQ.web_system_answer_3: Yes. The system is built with CMS content blocks, to easily update and expand your site, We also  going to provide documentation files to help you manage it.
Web_System_FAQ.web_system_question4: What if i need help after hand-off?
Web_System_FAQ.web_system_answer_4: Ongoing support and maintenance can be added later if needed,You are never locked in but support is avaliable when required.
Web_System_FAQ.web_system_question5: How long until my website is live?
Web_System_FAQ.web_system_answer_5: Most website system projects go live within 7-14 days from the start date, depending on how quickly you provide content and feedback.
Web_System_FAQ.web_system_question6: Do i need any technical knowledge to manage my website?
Web_System_FAQ.web_system_answer_6: No. the CMS is built to be simple - If you can write an email, you can update your website. No coding required.
Web_System_FAQ.web_system_clear_answers: Clear answers before we start working together

Built_Supported_Hero.web_supported_hero_desc: We built your site and stay with you - maintenance and improvements included.
Built_Supported_Hero.web_supported_span4: Cancel anytime • Refund if not a good fit

Built_Supported_Page.web_supported_title2: A fully built,hosted and maintained website - designed for long-term performance and growth.
Built_Supported_Page.web_supported_desc1: Instead of a large upfront investment, you join a structured monthly plan where everything is handled for you: design, development, hosting, updates and ongoing improvements.
Built_Supported_Page.web_supported_desc2: Every partnership begins with a short consultation to define:
Built_Supported_Page.web_supported_list_item1: What are you trying to achieve with the website
Built_Supported_Page.web_supported_list_item2: How it should look feel and function
Built_Supported_Page.web_supported_list_item3: What setup will scale best long-term
Built_Supported_Page.web_supported_desc3: Each Setup & Maintenance project is adapted per business. Structure, design, and features are tailored to your content, goals, and workflow — and we continuously maintain the system as your needs evolve.
Built_Supported_Page.web_supported_desc4: Once live, we stay involved — handling updates, fixes, and improvements to ensure the website keeps performing and scaling without requiring internal management.
Built_Supported_Page.web_supported_subscription: Monthly subscription starts at 49€/month after setup

Maintenance_Hero.maintenance_hero_desc1: CMS - powered foundation built for reliable maintenance, smooth updates, and worry-free long term operation.

Maintenance_Page.maintenance_desc1: Your website is continuously maintained to ensure long-term performance, security, and stability. We handle CMS updates, monitoring, optimizations, and improvements on an ongoing basis, keeping everything running smoothly without interruptions or surprises.
Maintenance_Page.maintenance_desc2: After you subscribe, we begin with a consulation to understand:
Maintenance_Page.maintenance_list_item1: Your current website state, goals and ongoing needs
Maintenance_Page.maintenance_list_item2: Decide how the site will be maintained, how to function and evolve moving forward.
Maintenance_Page.maintenance_desc3: Each Setup & Maintenance project is adapted per business. Structure, design, and features are tailored to your content, goals, and workflow — and we continuously maintain the system as your needs evolve
Maintenance_Page.maintenance_desc4: Each Maintenance project is tailored to your business. Updates, structure adjustments, and feature improvements are aligned with your content, workflow, and priorities — and the system is continuously maintained as those needs change.
Maintenance_Page.maintenance_price: Monthly maintenance and support from €199 • cancel anytime

Maintenance_Page_FAQ.maintenance_question1: What happens after i start the maintenance subscription?
Maintenance_Page_FAQ.maintenance_answer1: After you subscribe we review your site, and align on ongoing goals, priorities and maintenance needs.
Maintenance_Page_FAQ.maintenance_question2: How quickly you respond to issues?
Maintenance_Page_FAQ.maintenance_answer2: We aim to respond to all requests related to our projects within 24h on business days.
Maintenance_Page_FAQ.maintenance_question3: Can i request new features or design changes?
Maintenance_Page_FAQ.maintenance_answer3: Yes, small updates and improvements are included. Larger features or redesigns are handled as separate projects.
Maintenance_Page_FAQ.maintenance_question4: How do we communicate during the maintenance period?
Maintenance_Page_FAQ.maintenance_answer4: We keep things simple - we are always available by email or whatsapp, no complications or long response wait time.
Maintenance_Page_FAQ.maintenance_answer5: No. maintenance is built monthly and can be cancelled at any time.There are no long term contracts, or hidden obligations.
Maintenance_Page_FAQ.maintenance_question6: What is included in monthly maintenance?
Maintenance_Page_FAQ.maintenance_answer6: Maintenance includes updates, fixes and improvements to ensure your website stays fast, secure, and up to date. Everything is handled on your behalf without the need for internal technical managament.
Maintenance_Page_FAQ.maintenance_answer7: Hosting is not included, we help you choose, set up and connect reliable hosting option, so you can stay in full control.
Maintenance_Page_FAQ.maintenance_faq_title2: Clear answers before we start working together

Approach.approach_desc: We design and built high performance websites that load fast, scale effortlessly, and stay clear from strategy to launch
Approach.approach_item_text1: Fast load time, clean structure, and reliable foundations
Approach.approach_item_text2: Clear messaging, strong hierarchy and trust focused design
Approach.approach_item_text3: Webflow of custom code, builds that are simple to update
Approach.card_title2: A premium site that builts trust, and makes it easy for clients to take action

FAQ.faq_desc: Clear answers before we start working together
FAQ.faq_1: How long does a typical project take?
FAQ.faq_1_answer: Most projects take between 7-14 days, depending on scope, content readiness and feedback speed
FAQ.faq_2: Do you built with custom code or Webflow?
FAQ.faq_2_answer: We choose the right approach per project, - custom code for flexibility and performance. Webflow for speed and easy management.
FAQ.faq_3: Can i update the website myself after launch?
FAQ.faq_3_answer: Yes, We built sites to be easy to manage, either through Webflow CMS or clean documented custom code
FAQ.faq_4_answer: We offer optional post-launch support, for updates improvements and long-term growth
FAQ.faq_5_answer: We require 50% upfront to begin, and 50% on delivery. We accept bank transfer, PayPal and card via Stripe.
FAQ.faq_6: Will i own the website after it is built?
FAQ.faq_6_answer: Yes - 100%. You get full ownership of the code, domain and hosting. No lock-in contracts
FAQ.faq_7_answer: Every project includes up to 3 rounds of revisions.We work closely with you throughout so changes are usually minimal.

Team.team_desc: You will work directly with the people designing and building your website. - No layers no handoffs
